text:
A place of public assembly shall include (1) a theatre, (2) a moving picture house, or

(3) an assembly hall maintained or leased for pecuniary gain where one hundred or more persons may assemble for amusement or recreation.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 131-A — Place of public assembly

A place of public assembly shall include (1) a theatre, (2) a moving picture house, or

(3) an assembly hall maintained or leased for pecuniary gain where one hundred or more persons may assemble for amusement or recreation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: A place of public assembly shall include (1) a theatre, (2) a moving picture house, or
an assembly hall maintained or leased for pecuniary gain where one hundred or more persons may assemble for amusement or recreation.
